items.title: Former Arsenal star’s son, aged 18, quits Tottenham to join Gunners in shock transfer to bitter North London rivals
items.summary: ARSENAL have signed Tottenham prospect Elijah Upson after he turned down a new contract with the rival club, reports suggest. items.title: Ruthless All Blacks prove too strong for Ireland at Eden Park
items.summary: A ruthless All Blacks display ensured they will end their home block of rugby's inaugural Nations Championship with three wins from three, after emphatically beating Ireland 40-21 at Eden Park.

items.summary: It is a new era for Aston Villa - and Johan Manzambi, who has just joined in a club record deal worth more than £50m - will be one of the poster boys.

items.title: The harrowing dark side of England's World Cup exit
items.summary: During a major football tournament such as the World Cup, some women and girls are constantly living in fear - because domestic abuse rises when England play, research shows.
